title: Build refunds detail page with intake-governed workflow
goal: Route a new feature request through the correct governance workflow and initialize the document bundle before implementation.
brief: The user wants a new refunds detail page and explicitly expects workflow-first execution.
constraints: intake is the only public entry
documents must be created under docs/YYYY_MM_DD_中文任务名_vN/
engineering cannot start before explicit user confirmation

required_documents.purpose: Capture goals, scope, constraints, and acceptance direction.

user_confirmation.document_bundle_summary: 6A bundle needs initialization before code generation.

execution_plan.step: Classify workflow and initialize document bundle plan

code_change_targets.change_summary: Planned new feature file for refund detail page.

handoff_history.reason: The request is a greenfield feature and must be decomposed by planner under 6A.
handoff_history.responsibility_notice: Intake stops at request normalization and workflow selection. Planner now owns decomposition and document-bootstrap planning. No execution or worker dispatch is allowed at this stage.
handoff_history.decision_summary: Selected 6A because the request describes a new page and requires workflow-first delivery.

status_reason: Request normalized and ready for planning.
